title: The ultimate emerald mod
description: This mod brings emerald items to the game this includes armor and tools + a brand new dimension and the jeweler villager profession
body:
This mods is a simple mod that adds some emerald items and a new dimension to explore, the purpose of this mods is to increase minecraft content and playtime of your worlds

**This mod includes:**

- Emerald tools and armor
- A brand new dimension
- A new villager profession (the jeweler)
- the buff villager mini boss
- The herobrine boss
- The void potion

**Here are some images:**

![Strange dimension Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6a9884e34aeba505a3e57e35eeee6e10e442590.png)

![New building blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc86d950ca89cf48e60e47ea7086761cecb7b0a.png)

![The new villager profession](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f268710f719528e38966f9328e2c3c48f2f1cb8c.png)
